4SN-LBLH-COUPEGLASSES-10PC-BUN.product_description:
Offering up some serious tactile and optical intrigue, these classic and timeless etched champagne coupe glasses will quickly become the talk of your table.

Now, maybe you’re thinking, just how durable are these? And, practicality wise, will I actually ever use them? First, these things of beauty are dishwasher safe and incredibly durable; made from soda lime glass and weighing in at 0.55lbs per glass, they make look delicate and fragile, when in fact they hold their weight well with a sturdy stem and base. As for their practicality, we can’t help but brag about their versatility; whether it’s sparkling wine or champagne, straight up drinks, sugar rimmed cocktails, a chocolate mousse dessert or pretty yogurt parfait, these coupe glasses can do it all.

Now, if you’re still not convinced, let’s talk about their design. Not to get all technical, but we need to point out that these champagne glasses feature the classic wide rim bowl with tapered lip design that all traditional coupe glasses should have. Why does this matter? Elevating your drinking experience where aromas and flavors are concerned, these coupe glasses enhance both of the former, and if served in another type of glass, like a tall tumbler or champagne flute, would likely be missed. This distinct and intentional rounded shape aerates natural flavors and boosts aromas, allowing the wine or craft cocktail you’re about to sip to be enjoyed at its full potential.

And lastly, on the visual design front, these coupe glasses will elevate any table setting, whether it be a casual brunch or formal dinner. They’ll sit pretty with a variety of other glassware and tabletop decor, adding a touch of vintage flair, while simultaneously grounding your tablescape with their classic design.

So, without further ado… pop the champagne and grab a glass, these sparkling wine coupe glasses are perfect for any celebratory occasion.

bullet_point: CHEMICAL RESISTANCE: Highly resistant to acids, alkalis and organic solvents; not vulnerable to damage caused by steam or sea water

MADE IN THE USA

ASR Place Holder.product_description:
The Technora 950lb Survival Cord by ASR Outdoor is an essential item to pack with for EDC, emergency preparedness, and ultralight backpacking. It is strong and compact while being 8x stronger than steel by weight, with a thermal decomposition threshold of 930 degrees Fahrenheit, and is totally resistant to acids, alkalis, and seawater. While Technora Survival Cord is abrasion resistant, has a low creep and low thermal shrinkage with excellent dimensional stability; the main benefit of ASR Outdoor Technora 950lb Survival Cord is that it is stronger and more durable than standard 550lb paracord, at less than half the diameter.

ASR Outdoor Technora Survival Line features a Polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) coating, This coating protects the Technora from UV damage, increases abrasion resistance and flexibility, giving better knot strength, and chemical resistance. It weighs almost nothing and takes up little space, so it is a must-have for your survival kit. Being that it is extremely heat resistant, it can be used as a friction saw for cutting through flex cuff handcuffs and PVC pipe.

Other applications for Technora Survival Cord include aerial surveillance balloons, motion picture gimbaled lines for remote video cameras, recreation Applications, heavy duty fishing assist cords and leaders.

MADE IN THE USA

bullet_point: 5 GALLON CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Soil sifting mesh classifiers will fit on top of 5 gallon bucket and our 14" gold pan; Interlocking, stackable design; Top Diameter: 13.25", Bottom Diameter: 11"
RUGGED DESIGN: Constructed from high-impact durable ABS plastic with 304 stainless steel wire mesh
CLASSIFIER SIFTING SCREEN SIZE: 1/100"- 10,000 Holes per Square Inch
GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Classifying your raw material down is imperative for successful gold recovery; removing large and worthless rocks from your high-yielding pay dirt
FIELD TESTED: Easily screen off gravel and rock from your findings to locate gold and other treasures hidden within your raw material
IGE-ASR-ASRINCHGREENRIFFLES.product_description:
The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting and mineral recovery. Utilizing our high-impact steel wire classifier sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting. The classifier soil sifting screens will you to increase the amount of material you can run by separating unwanted coarse raw material into finer, manageable good material ready to wash in your gold pan or run through a sluice box. Available in 9 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, ensuring you'll be able to properly sift all size material.

These sifting classifier screens are made of tough, high-impact plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh with a reinforced high side wall. Each screen will fit over a standard 5 gallon bucket as well as a 14" gold pan and they are stackable, interlocking into each other to ensure that they will not slip or slide when used in conjunction with one another.

Proper classification of material by size is the key to more efficient gold separation. This is true for roughing out your material, all the way to the final step of fine gold separation. Using a sieve works for panning, sluicing and high banking equally well.

Screening or classifying material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost.

Separating and processing your gold concentrates by size with a classifier makes gold recovery much more efficient and less labor intensive, is faster and a more effective way to sort speeding up the panning process, resulting in more gold.

IGE-ASR-MESHPANNINGMATERIALSBASED.product_description:
The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting and mineral recovery. Utilizing our high-impact steel wire classifier sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting. IGE-PLC-PARACORD-BELT-BLK.product_description:
Having a good, solid rope could come in handy in just about any outdoor emergency situation, so why not keep some around your waist?

Be prepared for any adventure turned emergency with this every day survival gear ParaLace 550 Survival Paracord Duty Belt. Ideal for both essential preparedness and tactical applications, you never know when you'll have to improvise in the field. With over 100 feet of unraveled paracord you can rig a tent, make a fire-starter bow, set snares, go fishing, repair gear, and much more. There are many creative places to store paracord but wearing it around your waist is one of the the most practical. Use the unraveled paracord to tie a load to the roof of your car, hang your gear from a tree while camping or even make a sling in a pinch to get off a mountain in a real emergency.

These survival gear paracord belts are constructed of highly durable Milspec 550 Tactical Paracord; is made from 7 Stands of 100% genuine Mil-Spec 550lb parachute cord. The same stuff used by the US Military. It has a breaking strength of 550lbs with a working load of 220lbs. The overall thickness of the parachute cord line is 5/32" diameter and has a consistent stretch of just 10% elongation under loaded weight in product tests.

Each wilderness survival belt features a stainless steel belt buckle, that locks in your desired waist length at any interval you desire. These paracord belts are a universal fit as they are very adjustable; no pre-made belt holes, just stick the belt clasp through the paracord weave wherever it fits most comfortably for best fit.

Beef up your bug out bag with this essential piece of daily gear, the ParaLace paracord belt.

bullet_point: ENHANCED SECURITY: Designed for theft detection and identification of stolen or altered items. Once touched, remains on fingers and hands, invisible except under UV light

VERSATILITY: Packaged as a powder, this special anti-theft formula can be made into a paste by mixing with petroleum jelly then can be applied to virtually any surface including a door knob, laptop keyboard, jewelry, personal safe, locks, keypad or anything that needs an extra layer of added security; the UV light powder is recommended for indoor use and paste for outdoor use

INVISIBLE TO THE EYE: The traceable powder is completely invisible to the human eye until shone on by an UV light or UV flashlight; the powder readily transfers to the fingers and hands when touched leaving the subject glowing when put under UV light inspection

A LITTLE GOES A LONG WAY: A little invisible UV light tracing powder goes a long way; when using indoors, simply apply with a soft tipped brush to desired item or area; if using outdoors mix with petroleum jelly or Vaseline and apply where needed
SPECIFICATIONS: UV light powder only; 1/4 oz container; Non-toxic; Made in the USA Under License for ASR Federal; Recommended for use with the ASR Federal UV Flashlight
IGE-SHM-PTDSPUU.product_description:
Identify your stolen or tampered items and detect the thief when you use ASR Federal UV Stain Powder.

The ASR Federal Professional Covert Theft Detection UV Stain Powder Security is an essential item specifically designed for thief detection and the identification of stolen or altered items.

Lightweight, small and easy easy to apply, the traceable UV light powder is a must-have in for anti-theft, security accessories and theft detection kits. Notably, the UV light invisible security powder is suitable for business and homeowners who want an extra layer of added protection in their commercial space or additional home security.

How does it work? Once applied, all you need is an UV light or UV flashlight. An article that has been marked will remain invisible to the human eye, but under the UV light, the item and anyone who touched it can be identified. Powder, once touched, remains on fingers, hands and potentially clothing.

The traceable UV light substance can be used a power or paste. The UV light traceable security powder is predominantly meant for indoor use and can easily be applied with a soft-tipped brush. It’s important to note a little goes a long way and you don’t have to douse an entire item for the powder to be effective. It’s best to think about how a thief would naturally move or touch an item and focus on those specific areas first. If you’re taking this powder outdoors, it’s best to mix a little of the invisible UV light security powder with Vaseline (petroleum jelly). Again, using a brush to apply is ideal if you have one on hand.

The best part about the ASR Federal UV Light Theft Detection Powder is not only its effectiveness, but also its versatility. The traceable UV light security powder is usable on a variety of indoor items such as a laptop, piece of jewelry, a personal safe, keyboard and much more

bullet_point: COUNTERFEIT DETECTION INK - Filled with Iodine-based Ink Designed to Determine Currency Authenticity | Yellow Mark = Real, Black Mark = Counterfeit
RESULTS WITHIN SECONDS - Fast-acting Detection Ink Determines Authenticity Immediately | Catch Crooks Quickly without Inconveniencing Honest Customers
INK FADES QUICKLY - Ink Fades within Hours of Being Marked | Wont Ruin Genuine Currency or Prevent it From Being Used Later

WORKS ON US AND INTERNATIONAL CURRENCY: Compatible with Bill Currencies in Argentina, Brazil, Britain, Euro Countries, Hong Kong, Japan, Korea, Macao, Malaysia, New Zealand, Russia, South Africa, Taiwan, Thailand and USA

PROTECT YOUR BUSINESS - Inexpensive Way to Determine Authenticity at Point of Sale | Must-have Anti-counterfeit Detection Device for Business Owners, Entrepreneurs, Bank Tellers and Law Enforcement Officers
IGE-SON-COUNTERFEITPEN-BLK.product_description:
Are you looking to detect counterfeit currency without bearing the cost of expensive gadgets? Then the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen is the perfect tool for you.

This detector pen is filled with an iodine-based ink designed to be applied to banknotes in an attempt to determine authenticity. Most genuine banknotes are printed on paper made with cotton fibers and do not contain the starches that are reactive with iodine, so when the pen is used to mark genuine bills the mark will be yellowish or colorless. Counterfeit bills, however, are typically printed on photocopier paper or standard printer paper, so the ink from this pen will change to black if the bill is counterfeit. If the bill you test has a yellow/colorless mark, it is real. If the mark is black, it is fake.

Our counterfeit currency detector pen will provide results within seconds, and the mark will fade completely within a few hours.
